Height.description: Total height of the opening. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Width.description: Total width of the opening. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

SinusoidalLength.description: Width of the sinusoidal part of the opening. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

WidthWebPost.description: Clear distance between openings. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Spacing.description: Centre to centre distance between openings. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
